sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 1011 of 2023 Special STRA 1012 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.1705/2023. 3. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2026 SIP Muhammad Nasir, PS Preedy South Karachi. Mr. Jazib Aftab Memon, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of applicant, same are taken on record. Pursuant to order dated 14.001.2026, Dr. Muhammad Aslam Mari, Commissioner Inland Revenue, Zone-III, MTO, Karachi, is present and stats that reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
